MERGE (src1:Source {id:'unit42-cryptoclippy-portuguese-speakers'})
ON CREATE SET
  src1.title = 'Unit 42: CryptoClippy cryptocurrency clipper campaign targeting Portuguese speakers',
  src1.publisher = 'Unit 42'
ON MATCH SET
  src1.title = coalesce(src1.title, 'Unit 42: CryptoClippy cryptocurrency clipper campaign targeting Portuguese speakers'),
  src1.publisher = coalesce(src1.publisher, 'Unit 42')
WITH src1

MERGE (camp1:Campaign {name:'CryptoClippy Portuguese-speaker cryptocurrency clipper campaign'})
ON CREATE SET camp1.summary = 'Malware campaign targeting Portuguese speakers to redirect cryptocurrency by replacing copied wallet addresses via a cryptocurrency clipper.'
ON MATCH SET camp1.summary = coalesce(camp1.summary, 'Malware campaign targeting Portuguese speakers to redirect cryptocurrency by replacing copied wallet addresses via a cryptocurrency clipper.')
MERGE (camp1)-[:supported_by {quote:'Unit 42 recently discovered a malware campaign targeting Portuguese speakers, which aims to redirect cryptocurrency away from legitimate users’ wallets and into wallets controlled by threat actors instead.'}]->(src1)
WITH src1, camp1

MERGE (mal1:Malware {name:'CryptoClippy'})
ON CREATE SET
  mal1.family = 'Cryptocurrency clipper',
  mal1.summary = 'Cryptocurrency clipper malware that monitors the clipboard for copied wallet addresses and replaces them with a threat-actor-controlled address to redirect funds.'
ON MATCH SET
  mal1.family = coalesce(mal1.family, 'Cryptocurrency clipper'),
  mal1.summary = coalesce(mal1.summary, 'Cryptocurrency clipper malware that monitors the clipboard for copied wallet addresses and replaces them with a threat-actor-controlled address to redirect funds.')
MERGE (mal1)-[:supported_by {quote:'The malware, which we call CryptoClippy, seeks to replace the user’s actual wallet address with the threat actor’s, causing the user to inadvertently send cryptocurrency to the threat actor.'}]->(src1)
WITH src1, camp1, mal1

MERGE (ta1:ThreatActor {name:'Unknown threat actors (CryptoClippy campaign)'})
ON CREATE SET
  ta1.motivation = 'financial',
  ta1.summary = 'Unattributed actors operating the CryptoClippy campaign to redirect cryptocurrency payments by replacing wallet addresses.'
ON MATCH SET
  ta1.motivation = coalesce(ta1.motivation, 'financial'),
  ta1.summary = coalesce(ta1.summary, 'Unattributed actors operating the CryptoClippy campaign to redirect cryptocurrency payments by replacing wallet addresses.')
MERGE (ta1)-[:motivated_by]->(:Motivation {type:'financial'})
MERGE (ta1)-[:supported_by {quote:'...redirect cryptocurrency away from legitimate users’ wallets and into wallets controlled by threat actors...'}]->(src1)
WITH src1, camp1, mal1, ta1

MERGE (camp1)-[:includes {evidence:'Campaign uses the CryptoClippy cryptocurrency clipper malware.', source_id:src1.id}]->(mal1)
MERGE (camp1)-[:includes {evidence:'Threat actors operate the campaign to redirect cryptocurrency to actor-controlled wallets.', source_id:src1.id}]->(ta1)
WITH src1, camp1, mal1, ta1

MERGE (vic1:Victim {name:'Portuguese-speaking users (work machines)'})
ON CREATE SET vic1.summary = 'Victims identified across multiple industries; likely personal cryptocurrency wallets impacted via work machines. Targeting focuses on Portuguese speakers.'
ON MATCH SET vic1.summary = coalesce(vic1.summary, 'Victims identified across multiple industries; likely personal cryptocurrency wallets impacted via work machines. Targeting focuses on Portuguese speakers.')
MERGE (camp1)-[:targets {evidence:'Campaign targets Portuguese speakers.', source_id:src1.id}]->(vic1)
WITH src1, camp1, mal1, ta1, vic1

MERGE (sec1:Sector {name:'Manufacturing'})
MERGE (sec2:Sector {name:'Technology'})
MERGE (sec3:Sector {name:'Other'})
WITH src1, camp1, mal1, ta1, vic1, sec1, sec2, sec3

MERGE (inc1:Incident {id:'unit42-cryptoclippy-pt-001'})
ON CREATE SET
  inc1.type = 'malware campaign',
  inc1.summary = 'CryptoClippy cryptocurrency clipper campaign targeting Portuguese speakers; delivered via Google Ads and traffic distribution systems (TDS) leading to WhatsApp Web impersonation domains and prompting download of .zip/.exe to reach final payload.'
ON MATCH SET
  inc1.type = coalesce(inc1.type, 'malware campaign'),
  inc1.summary = coalesce(inc1.summary, 'CryptoClippy cryptocurrency clipper campaign targeting Portuguese speakers; delivered via Google Ads and traffic distribution systems (TDS) leading to WhatsApp Web impersonation domains and prompting download of .zip/.exe to reach final payload.')
MERGE (inc1)-[:supported_by {quote:'To deliver the malware... used both Google Ads and traffic distribution systems (TDS) to redirect victims to malicious domains that are impersonating the legitimate WhatsApp Web application.'}]->(src1)
WITH src1, camp1, mal1, ta1, vic1, sec1, sec2, sec3, inc1

MERGE (inc1)-[:attributed_to {confidence:'low', evidence:'Threat actors referenced but not named; attribution unknown.', source_id:src1.id}]->(ta1)
MERGE (inc1)-[:involved_malware {evidence:'CryptoClippy cryptocurrency clipper payload used in campaign.', source_id:src1.id}]->(mal1)
MERGE (inc1)-[:targets {evidence:'Targets Portuguese-speaking users.', source_id:src1.id}]->(vic1)
MERGE (inc1)-[:targets_sector]->(sec1)
MERGE (inc1)-[:targets_sector]->(sec2)
MERGE (inc1)-[:targets_sector]->(sec3)
WITH src1, inc1

MERGE (tech1:Technique {technique_id:'T1566', name:'Phishing', tactic:'Initial Access'})
ON CREATE SET tech1.summary = 'User-directed delivery to entice victims into downloading malicious files.'
ON MATCH SET tech1.summary = coalesce(tech1.summary, 'User-directed delivery to entice victims into downloading malicious files.')
MERGE (inc1)-[:used_technique {phase:'Initial Access', details:'Malicious domains impersonating WhatsApp Web; attempts to trick users into downloading malicious .zip or .exe leading to final payload.', evidence:'Victims redirected to WhatsApp Web impersonation domains and prompted to download .zip/.exe.', source_id:src1.id}]->(tech1)
WITH src1, inc1

MERGE (tech2:Technique {technique_id:'T1583', name:'Acquire Infrastructure', tactic:'Resource Development'})
ON CREATE SET tech2.summary = 'Use of attacker-controlled domains for delivery/impersonation.'
ON MATCH SET tech2.summary = coalesce(tech2.summary, 'Use of attacker-controlled domains for delivery/impersonation.')
MERGE (inc1)-[:used_technique {phase:'Resource Development', details:'Malicious domains impersonating the legitimate WhatsApp Web application.', evidence:'Redirected victims to malicious domains impersonating WhatsApp Web.', source_id:src1.id}]->(tech2)
WITH src1, inc1

MERGE (tech3:Technique {technique_id:'T1115', name:'Clipboard Data', tactic:'Collection'})
ON CREATE SET tech3.summary = 'Monitors clipboard for copied data of interest.'
ON MATCH SET tech3.summary = coalesce(tech3.summary, 'Monitors clipboard for copied data of interest.')
MERGE (inc1)-[:used_technique {phase:'Collection', details:'Monitors victim clipboard for signs of cryptocurrency wallet addresses being copied.', evidence:'Cryptocurrency clipper monitors the victim’s clipboard for wallet addresses.', source_id:src1.id}]->(tech3)
WITH src1, inc1

MERGE (tech4:Technique {technique_id:'T1565', name:'Data Manipulation', tactic:'Impact'})
ON CREATE SET tech4.summary = 'Modifies data to alter its meaning or effect.'
ON MATCH SET tech4.summary = coalesce(tech4.summary, 'Modifies data to alter its meaning or effect.')
MERGE (inc1)-[:used_technique {phase:'Impact', details:'Replaces copied cryptocurrency wallet address with attacker-controlled wallet address to redirect funds.', evidence:'Replaces the user’s actual wallet address with the threat actor’s.', source_id:src1.id}]->(tech4);
